{{CargoRelic
|name=April's Radiance
|class_id=20955
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The fourth law of natural cycles: When a myriad of flowers bloom, the colors and vitality of nature reach their peak. Let us seek inspiration in the sea of flowers and enjoy the warmth and vitality of spring!
|fame=32
|art=15
|fth=18
|civ=13
|tech=12
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail DEF +1<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail DEF +2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail DEF +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail DEF +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400
|ss7=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 10 Lucky Star gained, Snail DEF +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 2400/2400<br> (Awakened)
}}
